title: SessionType
description: Session type configuration defining the backend plugin and capabilities. Multiple session types can share the same plugin_instance_id with different metadata configurations — the plugin receives session_type_id and metadata in every call context (see ADR-0026).

description.description: Detailed description of the session type

plugin_instance_id.description: GTS instance ID of the registered ChatEngineBackendPlugin. Multiple session types may reference the same plugin_instance_id with different metadata (see ADR-0026)

metadata.description: Plugin-specific configuration forwarded verbatim to the plugin in every call context (session_type_metadata field). Allows one plugin to serve multiple differently-configured session types (e.g., different model, prompt strategy, feature flags).

available_capabilities.description: Capabilities returned by the plugin via `on_session_type_configured`. This is the maximum set available for UI display and session type discovery. Users select `Session.enabled_capabilities` from this catalog.

retention_policy.description: Data retention and lifecycle policy for sessions of this type
